001/**
002 * Maintains the fixed vocabulary of primary commands understood by the {@link Parser}.
003 * <p>
004 * Each entry must stay synchronized with the branches handled in
005 * {@link GameEngine#interpretCommand(String)}.
006 * </p>
007 *
008 * @author Michael Kolling and David J. Barnes + D. Bureau
009 * @version 2008.03.30 + 2019.09.25
010 */
011public class CommandWords
012{
013    /** All valid first words, in display order for help text. */
014    private final String[] aValidCommands = { "go", "help", "quit", "look", "eat", "back" };
015
016    /**
017     * Tests membership of {@code pString} in the internal command table (case-sensitive).
018     *
019     * @param pString candidate verb, usually lower-case
020     * @return {@code true} if {@code pString} is a known command word
021     */
022    public boolean isCommand( final String pString )
023    {
024        for ( int vI = 0; vI < this.aValidCommands.length; vI++ ) {
025            if ( this.aValidCommands[vI].equals( pString ) )
026                return true;
027        }
028        return false;
029    } // isCommand()
030
031    /**
032     * Builds a single string listing every valid command, separated by spaces.
033     *
034     * @return space-delimited command list for help output
035     */
036    public String getCommandList()
037    {
038        StringBuilder vChaineDesCommandes = new StringBuilder();
039        for ( String vCommand : this.aValidCommands ) {
040            vChaineDesCommandes.append( vCommand ).append( " " );
041        }
042        return vChaineDesCommandes.toString();
043    } // getCommandList()
044} // CommandWords
